sentences.arabic: سَقَطَ الْمَطَرُ بِغَزَارَةٍ عَلَى الْمَدِينَةِ أَمَسِ.
sentences.translation: Jučer je pala jaka kiša na grad.
sentences.translationEn: Heavy rain fell on the city yesterday.

sentences.translation: Neke ulice su bile zatvorene zbog vode.
sentences.translationEn: Some streets were closed because of the water.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبَتِ الْبَلَدِيَّةُ مِنَ النَّاسِ الْبَقَاءَ فِي الْبُيُوتِ.
sentences.translation: Općina je zamolila ljude da ostanu kod kuće.
sentences.translationEn: The municipality asked people to stay at home.

sentences.translation: Kiša je prestala navečer i sunce se vratilo.
sentences.translationEn: The rain stopped in the evening and the sun returned.
